news.title: The Week in Breakingviews: Causes of correlation
news.description: [REUTERS] Despite renewed hostilities in ⁠the Strait ​of Hormuz, investors remain ​obsessed with artificial intelligence. This week’s update ​argues there will ​be few places to ‌hide ⁠when the AI trade goes into reverse. Plus: looking ​for ​Japan’s ⁠missing...

news.title: Apple bites OpenAI with lawsuit
news.description: [THE BOSTON HERALD] Apple has accused OpenAI of stealing trade secrets as it seeks to build its own hardware for ChatGPT, a major rupture in a partnership between the iPhone maker and the artificial intelligence company.

news.title: 5 Predictions From Sci-Fi Author Philip K. Dick That Came True
news.description: [BGR] Philip K. Dick predicted personalized advertising, artificial intelligence, autonomous vehicles, and the internet before they were ever real.

news.title: Instagram will charge for AI access
news.description: [SOCIAL MEDIA TODAY] In a weekly Q&A, Chief Adam Mosseri said artificial intelligence models “are very expensive to run,” forcing the company to “either throttle people or ask them to pay.”

news.title: Church of England to issue AI guidance as 'robot could give sermons'
news.description: [THE DAILY STAR] Church of England chiefs will reportedly issue rules on how to deploy artificial intelligence after Pope calls for tech to be disarmed to safeguard the future of humanity

news.title: Is the AI Bubble About to Burst?
news.description: [OILPRICE] Artificial intelligence is transforming business, but mounting evidence suggests its greatest value lies in supporting human expertise rather than replacing it.

news.title: TikTok launches AI literacy measures
news.description: [SOCIAL MEDIA TODAY] The app created a guide for spotting artificial intelligence usage and is about to introduce a learning hub designed to teach practical detection skills.

news.title: Meta removes Instagram’s AI remix option
news.description: [SOCIAL MEDIA TODAY] Only two days after launch, the company disabled a feature that allowed users to integrate other people’s content into artificial intelligence-generated images.

news.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.
